title: Trump Casino
relevance_summary: Market manipulation via sudden token launches and price volatility

prevention.rule: Block any tx that causes a sudden and extreme price drop in a short period

red_flags: large volume of transactions in a short period
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that causes a sudden and extreme price drop in a short period
summary: The TRUMP token launch caused a sudden and extreme price drop, resulting in significant losses. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions.
